case_title: KAVANAGH, TOM vs. RAMIREZ, MARINA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAVANAGH, TOM AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, MARINA RAMIREZ, ERIC RAMIREZ, ISMENIA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, MARINA RAMIREZ, ERIC RAMIREZ, ISMENIA
ORDER VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT/ENTER AMENDED JUDGMENT BASED UPON STIP MADE IN OPEN COURT AND TO DISMISS DEFT ERIC RAMIREZ AND ISMENIA RAMIREZ WITHOUT PREJUDICE FILED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAVANAGH, TOM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, MARINA RAMIREZ, ERIC RAMIREZ, ISMENIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1414 GUERRERO ST #3, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE PER CRC 522.

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, MARINA RAMIREZ, ERIC RAMIREZ, ISMENIA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAVANAGH, TOM AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, MARINA RAMIREZ, ERIC RAMIREZ, ISMENIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, MARINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: NOT IN ISSUE $6,540.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,540.00, LEASE FORFEITED, THIS IS AN AMENDED JUDGMENT.
